name: Olu Dara
abstract: Olu Dara Jones (born Charles Jones III; January 12, 1941) is an American cornetist, guitarist, and singer. He is the father of rapper Nas.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Charles Mingus Quintet, Max Roach Quartet, and Art Blakey and The Jazz Messengers

works.t: Anything Goes: I Get a Kick Out of You

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Cassandra Wilson
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Heath
about_quotes.evidence: So, by me knowing Kenny Rogers, and Olu Dara, their children ended up getting married
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Heath — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
